description_long: This scooter features a sleek, modern design with a straight, metallic T-bar handlebar and a long, rectangular deck. The handlebar is topped with green grips, providing a pop of color and comfort for the rider. The deck is wide and flat, finished in a dark color, and appears sturdy enough for urban commuting. The scooter is equipped with two small, solid wheels, one at the front and one at the rear, both designed for smooth rolling on paved surfaces. The stem connecting the handlebar to the deck is metallic and robust, suggesting durability and stability. No visible branding or headlight is present, giving the scooter a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A modern scooter with a metallic T-bar handlebar, green grips, a wide dark deck, and two small wheels, designed for urban use. The design is minimalist and functional, with no visible branding or headlight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the scooter, highlighting the straight handlebar, green grips, and the long, dark deck with both wheels visible.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the narrow profile, straight handlebar, and the alignment of the front wheel directly beneath the handlebar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same features from the other side, with the deck and wheels clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the width of the deck and the rear wheel, with the handlebar stem centered above the deck.
attribute_deck_design: long, rectangular, wide, smooth dark surface with no visible patterns
